tool_args.content:
# Backup and apply script
Backup-File -Path 'brain_server.py' -Destination 'backup_brain_server.py'
Apply-Patch -PatchFile 'brain_episode_v1.diff'
py_compile 'brain_server.py'
Smoke-Test 'run_once'
